mapper.select: SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN LENGTH(summary) > 100 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(summary, 100), '...') ELSE summary END as summary, category_id, view_count, like_count, created_at FROM article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN LENGTH(summary) > 100 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(summary, 100), '...') ELSE summary END as summary, category_id, view_count, like_count, created_at FROM article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM article WHERE status = 1
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.icon, COUNT(a.id) as articleCount FROM category c LEFT JOIN article a ON c.id = a.category_id AND a.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.icon ORDER BY articleCount DESC
